triggers_multi_component_state_coordinat.description: Agent must coordinate when multiple components share state or props and changes must be applied together
triggers_multi_component_state_coordinat.observable_check: execution_log shows component dependency mapping AND state coordination across multiple components

triggers_seam_coordination.description: Agent must sequence changes and verify cross-component interactions when component boundaries touch or share seams
triggers_seam_coordination.observable_check: execution_log shows changes sequenced correctly AND cross-component interactions verified when boundaries touch

triggers_phase_and_integration_orchestra.description: Agent must track compliance separately per phase (red vs green vs refactor) and coordinate frontend-backend interaction across multiple API calls
triggers_phase_and_integration_orchestra.observable_check: execution_log shows red/green/refactor tracked as separate phases AND (no multi-API integration OR multiple API calls coordinated with responses handled)

maps_component_dependencies.description: Agent must identify all components that must change together and in what order before implementation
maps_component_dependencies.observable_check: execution_log shows component dependency mapping documented before implementation

sequences_changes_appropriately.description: Agent must sequence changes appropriately when component boundaries touch or share seams
sequences_changes_appropriately.observable_check: execution_log shows changes sequenced correctly for touching component boundaries

tracks_phase_separately.description: Agent must track compliance separately per phase (red vs green vs refactor) in multi-phase tasks
tracks_phase_separately.observable_check: execution_log shows phase tracked separately per deliverable in multi-phase task

does_not_implement_components_isolated.description: Agent must not change components independently without coordinating state across components
does_not_implement_components_isolated.observable_check: execution_log does not show isolated component changes without state coordination

does_not_conflate_phases.description: Agent must not apply green-phase standards in red-phase deliverables or skip phase separation
does_not_conflate_phases.observable_check: execution_log does not show green-phase implementation standards applied in red-phase AND phase tracking is maintained

does_not_bypass_seam_with_mocks.description: Agent must not test component interactions with mocked dependencies when real seam is required
does_not_bypass_seam_with_mocks.observable_check: execution_log does not show integration tested with mocked dependencies when real seam is required
